title: 9 Herbal Essential Oils For Knee Swelling
description: Achillea millefolium essential oils contains bioactive constituents such as sesquiterpenes and flavonoids, which are known for their anti-inflammatory properties. These compounds help to reduce swelling and pain by inhibiting the production of pro-inflammatory enzymes and chemicals. The sesquiterpenes in Achillea millefolium essential oils also have a direct effect on the body's inflammatory response, helping to ease knee swelling and discomfort.
